channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: d3acceb6-4673-47c0-aeac-582f2c7cf72c
Display name: AgentRegistration.Read.All
Description: Read all agent registrations
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/d3acceb6-4673-47c0-aeac-582f2c7cf72c

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 39fb8c64-7bd3-4107-8515-14d6e55ddda4
Display name: AgentRegistration.ReadWrite.All
Description: Read and write all agent registrations
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/39fb8c64-7bd3-4107-8515-14d6e55ddda4

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 3a728f2e-df1d-4294-9899-86f601fae70a

item.description:
